info.name: I2V PAAS API
info.description:
Image-to-Video PAAS API requests used by i2v-worker.

Variables:
- `baseUrl`: PAAS API base URL (format: https://{username}:{password}@api.artworks.ai)
- `taskId`: Populated automatically after creating a task

request.description:
Create an image-to-video task.

**Required fields:**
- `type`: `"image-to-video"`
- `payload.image`: base64 data URL or https:// URL
- `payload.prompt`: text prompt describing the desired video

**Optional fields:**
- `payload.model`: `"wan-2.2"` (default) or `"ltx-2.3"`
- `payload.fps`: 8–24 (default: 16)
- `payload.numFrames`: 24–361 (default: 16)
- `payload.resolution`: `"480p"` | `"720p"` | `"1080p"` (default: `"480p"`)
- `payload.seed`: integer for reproducibility
- `payload.performance`: `"speed"` | `"quality"` | `"express"` (default: `"speed"`)
Same as 'Create Image-to-Video Task' but uses an HTTPS URL for the image instead of base64.

exec: pm.test('Status is a valid value', function () {
pm.test('Completed task has video URL', function () {

request.description:
Poll the status of a task.

**Terminal statuses:** `completed`, `failed`, `canceled`, `timeout`

When `status` is `completed`, the video URL is at `results.data.video.url`.
